posts.text: A wave of songs is taking aim at substandard men. posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
BREAKING: The IEA announces that Europe has just 6 weeks worth of jet fuel remaining as the Iran War shortage worsens.

The IEA also says that many flights may soon be cancelled as a result.

Jet fuel prices in Europe soared over +100% amid the war.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
The number of things that are extremely important/valuable that can only be done because of turbostratic fractal graphene keeps growing. 

Even the potential for longevity research and development is massive.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
